data.title: QTC Metric Gears increases stock metric gear options for industrial automation applications. Available at shop.sdp-si.com.
data.description: In recent news from Hicksville, New York, on January 13, 2026, QTC Metric Gears announced the expansion of its range of stock metric gearing solutions to cater to industrial automation and similar high-demand applications. The updated product offerings can now be accessed through shop.sdp-si.com, providing customers with a wider selection of gears to choose from.

data.title: Vaudoise is the first Swiss insurer to implement Guidewire Cloud Platform, integrating ClaimCenter and PolicyCenter for insurance excellence.
data.description: Vaudoise and Guidewire (NYSE: GWRE) have made a joint announcement in Munich that Vaudoise is now the first insurer in Switzerland to implement the Guidewire Cloud Platform. The company has recently completed the integration of Guidewire ClaimCenter and is in the process of integrating Guidewire PolicyCenter. With this adoption, Vaudoise has joined the ranks of global insurers leveraging the cloud-based platform for enhanced insurance operations. The platform offers scalability, security, and frequent updates, enabling insurers to focus on core modernization. This move signifies a commitment to insurance excellence for Vaudoise as they align with industry best practices.

data.title: US stock futures dip ahead of December CPI, with S&P 500 and Dow Jones slipping. Key numbers: 2.7% annual inflation rate, 0.3% monthly pace, 4.19% 10-year Treasury bond yield, 3.55% two-year bond yield. Fed likely to keep interest rates unchanged in January. Index performance: Dow Jones -0.13%, S&P 500 -0.12%, Nasdaq 100 -0.19%, Russell 2000 -0.22%. Alphabet reaches $4 trillion market value, Xpeng announces localized supply chain teams in Europe and ASEAN.
data.description: U.S. stock futures saw a decline after a positive close, with major benchmark indices trading lower. Annual inflation rate expected to be stable at 2.7% in December, with monthly pace at 0.3%. 10-year Treasury bond yield at 4.19%, two-year bond at 3.55%. FedWatch tool projects 95% likelihood of interest rates remaining unchanged in January. Index Performance: Dow Jones -0.13%, S&P 500 -0.12%, Nasdaq 100 -0.19%, Russell 2000 -0.22%. ETF Trusts SPY and QQQ were lower in premarket. SPY at $694.53 (-0.019%), QQQ at $626.40 (-0.12%). Alphabet Inc. rose 0.68% hitting $4 trillion market value, Apple confirmed Google Gemini will upgrade Siri. Xpeng Inc. dropped 2.63% despite plans to establish localized supply chain teams in Europe and ASEAN.

data.title: Former Federal Reserve Chair Janet Yellen criticizes criminal probe into current Fed Chair Jerome Powell, calls it 'extremely chilling'. Yellen believes the investigation undermines central bank independence. Financial markets show lack of concern with S&P 500 and Nasdaq closing slightly higher on Monday. Yellen defends Powell, stating the odds of him lying are zero and suggesting the Trump administration's motive is to remove him.
data.description: Janet Yellen, former Federal Reserve Chair and Treasury Secretary, has raised serious concerns about the criminal probe targeting current Fed Chair Jerome Powell. Yellen described the situation as "extremely chilling" for the central bank's independence. She expressed surprise at the lack of alarm in financial markets, stating that the market should be worried. Despite initial fears, on Monday, the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite rose by 0.16% and 0.26% respectively, and the Dow Jones Industrial Average closed 0.17% higher. Yellen defended Powell, asserting that the probability of him lying is "zero," and suggested that the Trump administration's pursuit of him is motivated by a desire to remove him from office. For the full article, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Monero and Dash set new highs with XMR up 29% and DASH up 19%, XMR surging to $680, XMR and DASH volumes spike 44% and 300%.
data.description: Privacy-oriented cryptocurrencies are experiencing substantial growth in value on Tuesday, surpassing the returns of more mainstream digital currencies. Monero (XMR) and Dash (DASH) have seen impressive surges of up to 29% and 19% in the past 24 hours, respectively. Both coins have witnessed heightened trading activity, with Dash's volume nearly tripling and Monero's volume spiking by 44% during this period. Monero soared to a new all-time high surpassing $680, marking a 56% increase in its value since the beginning of the year. These two cryptocurrencies have outpaced market leaders like Bitcoin. Detailed article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Astoriom names Will Edwards as CEO to scale up sample management ops globally. New appointment to drive growth.
data.description: In Rochdale, United Kingdom, Astoriom has recently appointed Will Edwards, MBA as the new CEO to facilitate the expansion of their sample management operations on a global scale.

data.title: IFS named Customers' Choice in 2025 Gartner® Field Service Management Report. Only vendor with distinction.
data.description: In London on January 13, 2026, IFS, a top Industrial AI software provider, was named a Customers' Choice in the 2025 Gartner® Peer Insights™ Voice of the Customer: Field Service Management report. They are the exclusive company to earn this recognition. The achievement highlights their exceptional performance in delivering solutions for field service management.

data.description: In 2025, Ant International facilitated more than 2 billion digital cross-border transactions for merchants operating in key emerging markets.

data.title: ROE Visual marks 20th anniversary in 2026 as a leader in LED display tech for live events, touring, broadcast, & installation.
data.description: In Shenzen, China, on January 13, 2026, ROE Visual, a prominent figure in LED display technology for various industries like live events, touring, broadcast, and installations, is marking its 20th anniversary. The celebration carries the theme "Beyond Stages. Passion On." Over the years, ROE Visual has established itself as a global leader in the field, serving numerous clients with innovative LED display solutions.

data.title: Crypto bill update bans stablecoins from paying interest, a win for banks. Senate draft prohibits yield tied to stablecoin holding.
data.description: The revised market structure bill in the Senate now includes a provision that bans the earning of yield specifically related to the ownership of a payment stablecoin.
